prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this! Tackling a hard task can be daunting, but it's also an opportunity to show your strength and resilience. Take a deep breath, clear your mind, and focus on breaking the task down into manageable steps. Remember to take breaks when needed, and celebrate small wins along the way. You've got the skills and determination to conquer this challenge. Go get 'em!
